features: EXCELLENT RECEPTION – Modern One For All aerial optimised for reception of HD digital TV
ENJOY FREEVIEW - With Freeview, you can watch over 60 digital TV channels and up to 15 HD channels through your One For All aerial.
3G/4G LTE FILTER - Enjoy a crystal clear reception with this One For All aerial, thanks to its unique 3G filter that shields all 3G mobile phone signals to ensure the best possible reception
FULLY ADJUSTABLE - tilt the adjustable loop and optimize the telescopic aerials for optimal signal capture
0-3 MILES RECEPTION RANGE - For best performance we recommend to use this aerial within a range of 3 miles from your nearest transmitter.
description: Product Description One For All Indoor TV Aerial (SV9305) Get excellent reception for digital TV (Freeview), and DAB radio with this Unamplified One For All Indoor aerial. Enjoy Freeview channels with this modern Amplified indoor aerial from One For All. With Freeview, you can watch over 60 digital TV channels and up to 15 HD channels through your One For All aerial. This One For All aerial has a unique 3G/4G block-filter to shield all mobile phone signals for the best reception possible. For perfect reception of Television and DAB radio signals, you can tilt or turn the fully adjustable loop and optimise the telescopic aerials.Installation is very simple, an easy to understand quick setup guide is included in the packaging together with a coaxial cable for a straightforward setup. For best performance, we recommend to use this Unamplified One For All Aerial within a range of 3 miles from your nearest transmitter. Box Contains Digital Antenna
